Where Every Bite Tells a Story

Authentic Malabar & Arabian Flavours Crafted with Passion

A Journey of Authentic Flavours

Makkani Restaurant brings together the rich culinary heritage of Malabar and Arabian traditions, creating an unforgettable dining experience for families, professionals, and food connoisseurs.

Every dish is crafted with premium ingredients, authentic spices, and time-honored recipes passed down through generations. Our chefs pour their passion into every plate, ensuring each bite transports you to the heart of Kerala and the Arabian Peninsula.

From our warm hospitality to our meticulously prepared cuisine, we believe in serving more than just food—we serve happiness, tradition, and memories.

10+
Years Experience
100%
Authentic Recipes

Signature Cuisines

Discover our carefully curated selection of authentic dishes, each prepared with passion and tradition

Malabar Biryani

Aromatic layers of basmati rice with tender meat and authentic Malabar spices

Arabian Mandi & Kabsa

Traditional Arabian rice dishes with perfectly spiced meat and rich flavors

Grilled & Alfahm Specials

Charcoal-grilled perfection with signature marinades and smoky flavors

Fried & Broasted Chicken

Crispy golden chicken with secret spice blends and perfect seasoning

Beverages & Desserts

Refreshing drinks and indulgent sweets to complete your dining experience

Our Menu

Explore our carefully crafted menu featuring authentic Malabar and Arabian delicacies

Starters

Arabic Shawarma

Marinated meat wrapped in fresh pita with tahini and pickles

Chicken Nuggets

Tender chicken pieces coated in crispy golden batter

Chicken Popcorn

Bite-sized crispy chicken with spicy seasoning

French Fries

Perfectly crispy golden fries with house seasonings

Main Course

Malabar Chicken Biryani

Fragrant basmati rice layered with tender chicken and authentic spices

Mutton Biryani

Slow-cooked mutton with aromatic rice and traditional Malabar flavors

Arabian Chicken Mandi

Succulent chicken served over spiced rice with traditional mandi flavors

Mutton Mandi

Tender mutton with fragrant long-grain rice and Arabian spices

Arabian Specials

Chicken Kabsa

Traditional Saudi rice dish with tender chicken and aromatic spices

Mutton Kabsa

Flavorful mutton served with fragrant rice and authentic kabsa blend

Lamb Ouzi

Slow-roasted lamb with spiced rice, nuts, and raisins

Chicken Zurbian

Yemeni-style chicken with basmati rice and special zurbian spices

Grills & Fried

Alfahm Chicken (Full/Half)

Charcoal-grilled chicken with signature smoky marinade

Grilled Chicken

Perfectly grilled chicken with herbs and spices

Broasted Chicken

Pressure-fried chicken with crispy coating and juicy interior

Fried Chicken

Classic fried chicken with secret spice blend

Beverages

Fresh Juice

Seasonal fresh fruit juices

Soft Drinks

Chilled beverages and sodas

Arabic Coffee

Traditional Arabic coffee with cardamom

Mint Lemonade

Refreshing blend of fresh mint and lemon
